## Type of Change

- [ ] New country data
- [ ] Update to existing country data
- [ ] Correction to incorrect data
- [ ] Standards documentation update
- [ ] Script / tooling change
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] Country file is at `data/countries/XX.yaml` with the correct ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code
- [ ] `last_reviewed` is set to today's date (`YYYY-MM-DD`)
- [ ] All `mandatory` and `recommended` entries have at least one URL in `references`
- [ ] Sources are official government/agency documents (not news articles or blog posts)
- [ ] `python scripts/validate_data.py` passes locally (or CI passes on this PR)
- [ ] I have **not** edited generated files directly (`docs/map.svg`, `docs/index.html`, `webversion/`, or the `<!-- BEGIN_MATRIX -->` section of `README.md`)
